description: "Employee benefits represent an employee enrolled in a particular company benefit. It includes information specific to that employee’s enrollment."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get all benefits for an employee"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/employees/{employee_id}/employee_benefits"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Employee benefits represent an employee enrolled in a particular company benefit. It includes information specific to that employee’s enrollment.

Returns an array of all employee benefits for this employee

Benefits containing PHI are only visible to applications with the `employee_benefits:read:phi` scope.

scope: `employee_benefits:read`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
